title: Summary: Turn 57
content: Pueblo is a TypeScript/Node.js CLI + Desktop code agent with layered architecture: CLI entry, Command/Agent/Provider/Tool/Persistence/Desktop layers. Key decisions include dual-mode CLI/Electron entry, Provider abstraction for LLM (GitHub Copilot, DeepSeek), slash-command routing vs. task execution, Pepe memory subsystem with local embedding, and SQLite persistence via better-sqlite3.
